Anethum graveolens, also known as Dill, is an annual herb belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used for its carminative, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, offering various health benefits such as relieving digestive issues, reducing nausea, and preventing scurvy.
